title: Neolithic Tech
wikitext:
{{TechNav}}
= Neolithic Tech =

'''Neolithic Tech''' is the first tier of the [[Tech Levels|13-tier technology system]] — encompassing the earliest human technologies from stone/bone tools through basic agriculture. In the [[Natra|Natura]] universe, this is also the era of humanity's '''first unconscious interface with consciousness technology''' — shamanic practices representing proto-psionic awareness.

== Overview ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Classification !! Details
|-
| '''Tier''' || Type 0 (Local Civilization)
|-
| '''Era''' || Prehistory – Bronze Age
|-
| '''Key Innovations''' || Stone/bone tools, fire, basic agriculture, oral tradition
|-
| '''Psionic Status''' || Unconscious — channeled through ritual and shamanism
|}

== Key Technologies ==

* '''Stone and bone tools:''' First deliberate tool manufacture
* '''Fire mastery:''' Thermal energy control — first energy technology
* '''Basic agriculture:''' Food production and settlement
* '''Oral tradition:''' Information storage in consciousness — proto-information technology

== Consciousness Interface ==

In the Natura framework, Neolithic shamanic practices represent humanity's '''first psionic awareness:'''
* '''Ritual and trance states:''' Unconscious access to the [[Psi Field]]
* '''Spiral Energy:''' First channeled unconsciously through ceremony and sacred sites
* Proto-[[Ley Lines|Ley Line]] awareness — megalithic structures positioned on energy nodes
* These practices were not superstition but '''genuine proto-psionic technology''' later suppressed

== See Also ==
* [[Tech Levels]] — Complete tier system
* [[Medieval Tech]] — Next tier
* [[Suppressed Energy Tech]] — Technologies suppressed throughout history
* [[Psionics]] — The science that Neolithic shamanism foreshadowed

[[Category:Tech Levels]]

title: Neptune-Pluto Synodic Cycle
wikitext:
= Neptune-Pluto Synodic Cycle =
The '''♆ Neptune – ♇ Pluto Synodic Cycle''' tracks the recurring conjunction pattern between these planets.

== Cycle Significance ==
The Neptune-Pluto synodic cycle combines:
* '''♆ Neptune:''' Illusion, speculation, and emotional sentiment.
* '''♇ Pluto:''' Transformation, power, and market cycles.

When these planets form conjunctions, a new cycle of neptune-pluto themes begins. Oppositions mark the culmination point where these themes reach maximum expression and polarity.

== See Also ==
* [[Planetary Alignments]]
* [[Synodic Cycles]]
* [[Astrological Timeline]]

title: Nether
wikitext:
{| class="wikitable"
|-
| [[Angel]]( [[Archangel]] ) || [[Angels]]( [[Archangels]] ) || [[Ascended Lifeform]]( [[Ascended Lifeforms]] ) || [[Holy]]( [[Good]] ) || [[Heaven]]( [[Heavens]] ) || [[Bright]]( [[Light]] ) || [[Æther]]( [[Æthereal]] )
|-
| [[Demon]]( [[Devil]] ) || [[Demons]]( [[Devils]] ) || [[Infernal Lifeform]]( [[Infernal Lifeforms]] ) || [[Evil]]( [[Bad]] ) || [[Hell]]( [[Hells]] ) || [[Dark]]( [[Shadow]] ) || [[Nether]]( [[Nethereal]] )
|}

= [[Æther and Nether]] =

= Nether as Entropy =

Entropy is a fundamental concept in physics, chemistry, and information theory that represents a measure of disorder or randomness in a system. It is often described as a quantitative measure of the amount of energy in a physical system that is not available to do work. In thermodynamics, entropy is related to the dispersal of energy in a system and is associated with the tendency of systems to move towards equilibrium.

In simple terms, entropy can be understood as a measure of the degree of randomness or chaos within a system. Systems with high entropy are disordered and have a high degree of randomness, while systems with low entropy are more ordered and have less randomness.

Entropy is also associated with the concept of the second law of thermodynamics, which states that the entropy of a closed system tends to increase over time. This principle suggests that natural processes tend to move towards states of higher entropy, leading to the dissipation of energy and the eventual heat death of the universe.

In information theory, entropy is used to quantify the uncertainty or randomness in a set of data or information. It measures the average amount of information required to represent the data, with higher entropy indicating greater uncertainty or randomness.

== Description of Nether as a Medium: ==

Nether is conceptualized as a metaphysical medium that contrasts with the traditional understanding of Æther. It is associated with darkness, entropy, and the forces of decay and dissolution. The medium of Nether permeates the fabric of reality, exerting a pervasive influence on cosmic dynamics and the human experience. Here is a description of the medium of Nether:

Nether is a shadowy and mysterious medium that pervades the cosmos, shrouding existence in darkness and obscurity. It is the antithesis of light and life force, embodying the inexorable march toward entropy and decay. Within the realm of Nether, the laws of thermodynamics reign supreme, driving processes of disintegration and dissolution on cosmic and existential scales.

The medium of Nether interacts with matter and energy in subtle yet profound ways, promoting the breakdown of structures and the dissolution of form. It is a realm of profound mystery and ambiguity, where the boundaries between existence and non-existence blur and the forces of darkness hold sway.

While Nether is often associated with themes of death and decay, it also represents a realm of transformation and renewal, where the ashes of destruction give rise to new forms of existence. It is a realm of profound philosophical significance, inviting contemplation on the nature of impermanence, mortality, and the ultimate fate of the universe.

== Speculative Equations for Nether ==

Developing equations for Nether would involve considering its distinct properties and characteristics compared to [[Æther]]. While Æther is often associated with concepts like energy propagation, vibrational frequencies, and spatial continuity, Nether represents qualities of darkness, receptivity, and hidden aspects of existence. Here's a speculative exploration of potential equations for Nether:

# '''Dark Energy Density Equation:''' Analogous to energy density equations for Æther, a Nether equation could describe the density of dark energy permeating the cosmos. This equation might incorporate terms representing the density of hidden or occult forces underlying physical reality.
:: <math> \rho_{\text{Nether}} = f(\text{Nether properties}) </math>

# '''Shadow Potential Field Equation:''' In contrast to electromagnetic potential fields associated with Æther, Nether equations could describe potential fields representing the influence of shadowy or unseen forces. These fields may interact with matter and energy in subtle ways, affecting the dynamics of the physical universe.
:: <math> \nabla^2 \phi_{\text{Nether}} - \frac{1}{c^2} \frac{\partial^2 \phi_{\text{Nether}}}{\partial t^2} = -\rho_{\text{Matter}} </math>

# '''Entropy of the Unconscious Equation:''' Drawing from psychological and philosophical concepts, equations for Nether could describe the entropy or disorder associated with the unconscious mind. These equations might capture the complexity and hidden patterns within the psyche, analogous to entropy equations in thermodynamics.
:: <math> S_{\text{Nether}} = -k \sum_i p_i \log p_i </math>

# '''Wavefunction of Darkness Equation:''' In quantum mechanical interpretations, equations for Nether could involve wavefunctions representing the probability amplitudes of shadowy or hidden states of existence. These equations might describe the behavior of particles or entities existing in the realm of the unconscious.
:: <math> \Psi_{\text{Nether}}(x, t) = A e^{i(kx - \omega t)} </math>

# '''Unseen Force Interaction Equation:''' Similar to fundamental force equations in physics, Nether equations could describe the interaction between unseen forces and matter. These equations might involve coupling constants representing the strength of interactions between Nether and ordinary matter.
:: <math> F_{\text{Nether}} = G \frac{m_1 m_2}{r^2} </math>

It's important to note that these equations are speculative and metaphorical in nature, intended to provide conceptual frameworks rather than precise mathematical formulations. The exploration of equations for Nether requires interdisciplinary insights from physics, psychology, metaphysics, and philosophy to capture its elusive and enigmatic nature.

title: Netherons
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Netherons}}

== Netherons ==
'''Netherons''' are speculative entities within the realm of [[QuaziPhysics]], representing particles that embody fluctuations or excitations within the [[Nether]]. The Nether is a hypothetical, metaphysical medium that serves as a complementary or opposing force to the Æther, governing the absorption, transformation, and dissipation of energies in a shadow dimension or non-physical realm. Netherons play a crucial role in balancing the creative forces of the Æther, facilitating the processes of decay, entropy, and the return of energy to a primordial state.

=== Nature and Characteristics ===
Netherons are conceptualized as the quanta of the Nether, operating as the agents of transformation and dissolution within this dark, introspective medium. They are responsible for the absorption and reconfiguration of energy and matter, interacting with both physical and metaphysical systems to maintain balance within the universe.

* '''Energy Absorption and Dissipation''': Netherons are primarily involved in the absorption of energy, acting as the opposite of Ætherons. Where Ætherons facilitate the propagation of energy, Netherons govern its dissipation, returning it to a state of potentiality within the Nether. This process is akin to entropy in traditional physics, where energy becomes increasingly diffused and less available for work.

* '''Transformation of Energies''': Netherons are also responsible for the transformation of energies within the Nether, converting them from one form to another. This could involve the reconfiguration of psychic energy into a latent state, or the transformation of emotional or spiritual energy into a different frequency or form. Netherons thus play a key role in the metaphysical processes of decay, regeneration, and rebirth.

* '''Interaction with the Unconscious Mind''': Netherons are thought to interact with the unconscious mind, influencing states such as dreams, intuition, and deep meditation. They may govern the flow of subconscious thoughts and impulses, shaping the internal landscape of the mind in ways that are subtle yet profound. This interaction could explain phenomena like shadow work, where individuals confront and integrate aspects of the unconscious self.

=== Role in Metaphysical Phenomena ===
Netherons are central to the explanation of various metaphysical and psychic phenomena that involve transformation, dissolution, or the unconscious mind. They act as the agents of change within the Nether, ensuring that energy and matter are continually recycled within the metaphysical system.

* '''Entropy and Decay''': In the metaphysical framework of QuaziPhysics, Netherons govern the processes of entropy and decay, ensuring that energy is not perpetually retained in its active form but is instead returned to a state of potential within the Nether. This process is essential for maintaining the balance between creation and dissolution in the universe.

* '''Transformation of Psychic Energy''': Netherons may also be involved in the transformation of psychic energy, particularly when that energy needs to be grounded or neutralized. For example, a psychic practitioner might use Netherons to dissipate excessive or harmful energy, preventing it from causing imbalances or disturbances within the physical or metaphysical realms.

* '''Dreams and the Unconscious''': Netherons are believed to influence the realm of dreams and the unconscious mind, shaping the content and flow of subconscious thoughts. This influence might manifest in the form of vivid dreams, deep insights, or intuitive knowledge that arises without conscious effort. Netherons help to process and integrate experiences that are not fully understood or resolved at the conscious level.

* '''Shadow Work and Spiritual Transformation''': In spiritual practices, Netherons are thought to be involved in shadow work, where individuals confront and integrate the darker aspects of their psyche. By facilitating the transformation and integration of these aspects, Netherons help individuals achieve greater self-awareness and balance, promoting spiritual growth and healing.

=== Interaction with Other QuaziParticles ===
Netherons interact with other QuaziParticles within the metaphysical framework of QuaziPhysics, contributing to the complex dynamics of energy and matter within the Nether and beyond.

* '''Interaction with [[Ætherons]]''': Netherons and Ætherons operate as complementary forces within the dualistic system of Æther and Nether. While Ætherons facilitate the flow and propagation of energy, Netherons absorb and transform that energy, ensuring a cyclical balance between creation and dissolution. This interaction is fundamental to the ongoing processes of regeneration and decay in both physical and metaphysical realms.

* '''Interaction with [[Psyons]]''': Netherons can interact with Psyons, particularly in the process of neutralizing or dissipating excess psychic energy. For instance, after a psychic event or intense mental focus, Netherons might help to disperse residual Psyons, preventing psychic overload or burnout. This interaction ensures that psychic energy is used efficiently and sustainably.

* '''Interaction with [[Reverberons]]''': Netherons play a key role in modulating the effects of Reverberons, which represent the echoes or reverberations of actions, thoughts, or energies. By interacting with Reverberons, Netherons help to attenuate or transform the impact of these reverberations over time, ensuring that the consequences of past actions are balanced and integrated into the broader metaphysical system.

=== Theoretical Implications ===
The concept of Netherons extends traditional physics into the metaphysical realm, offering a speculative framework for understanding how energies are transformed and recycled within the universe.

* '''Metaphysical Entropy''': Netherons are central to the concept of metaphysical entropy within QuaziPhysics, where energy is not simply lost but transformed and returned to a state of potentiality within the Nether. This concept provides a framework for understanding the cyclical nature of energy and matter in both the physical and metaphysical worlds.

* '''Consciousness and the Unconscious''': The study of Netherons could contribute to broader research in consciousness and the unconscious mind, particularly in understanding how subconscious processes influence conscious experience. This research might explore the interaction between Netherons and neural activity, the role of dreams in psychological integration, and the potential for using Netherons in therapeutic or spiritual practices.

<sub>''Caption:'' Netherons are speculative QuaziParticles that govern the absorption, transformation, and dissipation of energies within the Nether, a metaphysical medium that complements the Æther in the balance of creation and dissolution.''</sub>

title: Neural Firewall
wikitext:
{| class="infobox" style="width:300px; font-size:90%; border:1px solid #aaa; background:#f9f9f9; margin:0.5em 0 0.5em 1em; padding:0.2em; float:right;"
! colspan="2" style="background:#333; color:#fff;" | '''Neural Firewall'''
|-
| '''Type''' || Mesh network psionic protection
|-
| '''Category''' || [[Psionic Defenses]]
|-
| '''Defends Against''' || [[Psi Jammer]], digital psi attacks, [[Neural Scrambler]]
|-
| '''Mechanism''' || Signal filtering, encryption, noise rejection
|-
| '''Real-World Parallel''' || TEMPEST / EMP hardening / network security
|}

The '''Neural Firewall''' is a software/hardware defense system that protects the [[Neural Network Hardware]] mesh and [[PsiLink]] communications against electronic and psionic attack. It operates at the data/signal layer rather than the field/energy layer — defending against threats that [[Defense Discs]] and [[Psi Defender]] cannot address.

== Operating Principle ==

The Neural Firewall implements multi-layered protection for the [[PsiSys]] digital infrastructure:

=== Layer 1: Signal Authentication ===
Every [[PsiLink]] transmission includes cryptographic authentication. The Neural Firewall rejects any signal that doesn't match known mesh member signatures — preventing spoofing, injection, and man-in-the-middle attacks on the psionic mesh.

=== Layer 2: Noise Filtering ===
Advanced adaptive filters extract valid signals from [[Psi Jammer]] noise. The Neural Firewall continuously characterizes ambient noise and applies real-time subtraction — maintaining communication even in degraded psionic environments.

<math>\hat{S}(t) = R(t) - \hat{N}(t) \quad \text{where } \hat{N}(t) \approx N_{\text{jammer}}(t)</math>

=== Layer 3: Isolation ===
If a mesh node is compromised (e.g., by [[Neural Scrambler]]), the Neural Firewall isolates the affected node — preventing cascading failure through the [[Neural Network Hardware]] mesh. Analogous to network segmentation in cybersecurity.

=== Layer 4: Hardening ===
Physical and electromagnetic hardening of [[Neural Network Hardware]] nodes against directed energy attack — reducing vulnerability to [[Psi Disruptor]] and Area Denial effects.

== Implementation ==

The Neural Firewall is not a separate device — it is a firmware/software layer running on existing [[Neural Network Hardware]] with specific hardware hardening modifications:

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Component !! Function !! Protection Against
|-
| '''Signal authenticator''' || Cryptographic PsiLink validation || Spoofing, injection, impersonation
|-
| '''Adaptive filter bank''' || Real-time noise characterization and subtraction || [[Psi Jammer]] area denial
|-
| '''Node isolation module''' || Mesh segmentation on compromise detection || Cascading failure, mesh collapse
|-
| '''EMP hardening''' || Physical shielding of Neural Network Hardware || Electromagnetic pulse, directed energy
|-
| '''Intrusion detection''' || Pattern matching against known attack signatures || [[Corruption Matrix]], sophisticated hacking
|}

== Tactical Properties ==

* '''Deployment:''' Pre-installed on all [[Fusion Engine Suit]] Neural Network Hardware (standard configuration)
* '''Update mechanism:''' [[PsiNet]] pushes threat signature updates; local [[PsiSys]] applies immediately
* '''Overhead:''' ~5–8% processing capacity consumed by continuous monitoring
* '''Limitation:''' Cannot protect against field-layer attacks ([[Psi Disruptor]], [[Mind Spike]]) — those require [[Defense Discs]] and [[Psi Defender]]

== Real-World Parallel: TEMPEST & Network Security ==

The Neural Firewall combines concepts from multiple real-world defensive technologies:

=== TEMPEST ===
'''TEMPEST''' is the NSA codename for standards and countermeasures against compromising emanations — electromagnetic signals that leak from electronic equipment and could be intercepted by adversaries. TEMPEST shielding prevents RF eavesdropping on classified systems — analogous to hardening [[Neural Network Hardware]] against psionic interception.

=== EMP Hardening ===
Military electronics are hardened against '''electromagnetic pulse (EMP)''' through Faraday caging, surge protection, and component-level shielding. The Neural Firewall's physical hardening layer implements the psionic equivalent.

=== Network Security ===
Standard cybersecurity principles directly map:
* '''Authentication''' → Signal authenticator (digital signatures / certificate pinning)
* '''Encryption''' → PsiLink encryption (prevents eavesdropping)
* '''Firewalling''' → Node isolation (prevents lateral movement)
* '''IDS/IPS''' → Intrusion detection (pattern-based threat identification)
* '''Segmentation''' → Mesh isolation on compromise

These are mature, well-understood defensive principles adapted to the psionic domain.

== See Also ==
* [[Psionic Defenses]] — Defense classification
* [[Neural Network Hardware]] — Protected system
* [[PsiLink]] — Protected communication layer
* [[Psi Jammer]] — Primary threat countered
* [[Psi Devices]] — Master device catalog

[[Category:Defenses]]
[[Category:Psionics]]
[[Category:Psi Devices]]

title: Neural Network Hardware
wikitext:
{| class="infobox" style="width:300px; font-size:90%; border:1px solid #aaa; background:#f9f9f9; margin:0.5em 0 0.5em 1em; padding:0.2em; float:right;"
! colspan="2" style="background:#333; color:#fff;" | '''Neural Network Hardware'''
|-
| '''Type''' || Psionic processing substrate
|-
| '''Developer''' || [[Clan Tho'ra]]
|-
| '''Function''' || Processing nodes for [[PsiSys]] mesh network
|-
| '''Paired With''' || [[Psi Emitter]]s
|-
| '''Network''' || [[PsiLink]] → [[PsiNet]]
|}

'''Neural Network Hardware''' is the physical processing substrate that [[PsiSys]] runs on. Distributed throughout the [[Fusion Engine Suit]], these hardware nodes connect to [[Psi Emitter]]s via [[PsiLink]] to form the intelligent psionic mesh network that manages all suit functions.

== Architecture ==
Neural Network Hardware operates as a distributed neural processing system:
* Each hardware node processes local psionic data
* Nodes connect to [[Psi Emitter]]s for input/output
* The mesh forms through [[PsiLink]] — each node relays for neighboring nodes
* The collective mesh produces [[PsiSys]] — an emergent intelligent system

== Function ==
Neural Network Hardware provides:
* '''Signal processing''' — interpreting psionic field data from [[Psi Emitter]]s
* '''Pattern recognition''' — identifying threats, targets, and environmental conditions
* '''Decision support''' — providing [[PsiSys]] with the computing substrate for intelligent behavior
* '''Communication routing''' — managing [[PsiLink]] mesh traffic between suit, vehicle, and team nodes
* '''Defense coordination''' — processing threat data for [[Psionic Defenses]] reconfiguration

== Vulnerability ==
The Neural Network Hardware mesh is the primary target of [[Psi Weapons]]. [[Defense Discs]] exist specifically to protect these hardware nodes — creating directional psionic shields that prevent hostile psionic energy from scrambling the neural processors.

== See Also ==
* [[PsiSys]] — the intelligent system running on this hardware
* [[Psi Emitter]] — the paired emission hardware
* [[PsiLink]] — the network protocol
* [[PsiNet]] — the broader network
* [[Defense Discs]] — shields protecting the neural mesh
* [[Psi Weapons]] — the primary threat to neural hardware

[[Category:Tho'ra Technology]]
[[Category:Psionics]]
[[Category:Equipment]]

title: Neural Scrambler
wikitext:
{| class="infobox" style="width:300px; font-size:90%; border:1px solid #aaa; background:#f9f9f9; margin:0.5em 0 0.5em 1em; padding:0.2em; float:right;"
! colspan="2" style="background:#333; color:#fff;" | '''Neural Scrambler'''
|-
| '''Type''' || Targeted neural pathway attack
|-
| '''Category''' || [[Psi Weapons]]
|-
| '''Target''' || Biological neural pathways (organic CNS)
|-
| '''Countered By''' || [[Psi Defender]], [[Psi Ward]]
|-
| '''Real-World Parallel''' || Havana Syndrome directed energy
|}

The '''Neural Scrambler''' is a [[Psi Weapons|psi weapon]] that targets biological neural systems rather than technological [[Neural Network Hardware]]. It disrupts specific neural pathways to cause cognitive impairment, memory disruption, motor dysfunction, or incapacitation.

== Operating Principle ==

The Neural Scrambler exploits the interface between the biological nervous system and the [[Psi Field]]. All sentient beings have some degree of psionic presence — even those without active psionic abilities. The Neural Scrambler targets this biological psionic signature, disrupting the natural bioelectric patterns that govern neural function.

Unlike the [[Psi Disruptor]] (which attacks hardware) or the [[Mind Spike]] (which targets consciousness), the Neural Scrambler attacks the '''physical neural substrate''' — causing measurable biological damage:

* '''Vestibular disruption''' — Balance loss, vertigo, nausea
* '''Cognitive degradation''' — Inability to focus, process information, or make decisions
* '''Memory interference''' — Short-term memory loss, confusion about recent events
* '''Motor dysfunction''' — Tremors, coordination loss, partial paralysis

== Tactical Employment ==

* '''Range:''' 20–100m (requires sustained exposure for full effect)
* '''Beam type:''' Tight beam (single target) or defocused cone (2–3 targets)
* '''Effect onset:''' Immediate symptoms within 2–5 seconds; full effect in 10–30 seconds
* '''Recovery:''' Minutes to hours depending on exposure duration (permanent damage possible)

=== Threat Scenarios ===

# '''Incapacitation:''' Render operators unable to function without destroying equipment
# '''Interrogation preparation:''' Soften targets for conventional interrogation
# '''Zone denial:''' Defocused mode creates area where unprotected personnel cannot operate
# '''Assassination:''' Sustained exposure causes permanent neural damage disguised as natural causes

== Countermeasures ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Defense !! Mechanism !! Effectiveness
|-
| '''[[Psi Defender]]''' || Active interception of incoming beam || High — deflects before impact
|-
| '''[[Psi Ward]]''' || Static barrier blocks scrambler transmission || High (within warded area)
|-
| '''[[HelmKit]]''' || Magnetogravitic bubble shields operator's neural aura || Medium — reduces exposure
|-
| '''[[Psi Harmonizer]]''' || Post-exposure field normalization || Recovery aid (not prevention)
|}

== Real-World Parallel: Havana Syndrome ==

The Neural Scrambler is grounded in the phenomenon known as '''Havana Syndrome''' — a series of unexplained health incidents affecting US and Canadian diplomatic personnel beginning in Havana, Cuba (2016) and subsequently reported in China, Russia, Austria, and Washington D.C.

Symptoms closely match Neural Scrambler effects:<ref name="havana">National Academies (2020). "An Assessment of Illness in U.S. Government Employees and Their Families at Overseas Embassies." National Academies Press.</ref>

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Havana Syndrome Symptom !! Neural Scrambler Parallel
|-
| Intense directional pressure/vibration || Neural field disruption onset
|-
| Acute hearing loss or tinnitus || Vestibular/auditory pathway scrambling
|-
| Severe headaches, vertigo || Cognitive circuit disruption
|-
| Cognitive difficulty, memory loss || Neural pathway degradation
|-
| Brain white matter tract changes (MRI) || Physical evidence of neural damage
|}

The 2020 National Academies report concluded that '''directed pulsed radio frequency energy''' was the most plausible mechanism — consistent with the Psi Disruptor operating principle extended to biological targets.

=== Related Technologies ===
* '''Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS)''' — Demonstrates that focused electromagnetic fields can selectively activate or suppress specific brain regions
* '''Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS)''' — Low-current brain stimulation affecting neural excitability
* '''US Patent 3,951,134''' (1976) — "Apparatus and method for remotely monitoring and altering brain waves"<ref name="patent1976">Malech RG (1976). US Patent 3,951,134.</ref>

== See Also ==
* [[Psi Weapons]] — Weapon classification
* [[Psi Defender]] — Active defense
* [[Psi Ward]] — Area barrier defense
* [[Mind Spike]] — Related (targets consciousness rather than pathways)
* [[Psi Devices]] — Master device catalog

== References ==
<references />

title: New Babylon
wikitext:
== New Babylon: The Heart of the Tri-state Area ==

[[File:NewBabylonSkyline.jpg|thumb|300px|Skyline of New Babylon]]

'''New Babylon''' is a sprawling [[Proto Mega-City]]; the metropolis situated at the epicenter of the Tri-state Area, encompassing the entirety of New York City's five boroughs (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx, and Staten Island), along with significant regions of New Jersey and Connecticut. Renowned for its vibrant culture, economic prowess, and iconic landmarks, New Babylon stands as a beacon of urban life and innovation in the Northeastern United States.

=== Geography ===

New Babylon's geographical expanse spans across the diverse landscapes of the Tri-state Area, ranging from the towering skyscrapers of Manhattan to the serene suburbs of Connecticut. The region is traversed by the majestic Hudson River and bordered by the vast Atlantic Ocean, offering stunning views and recreational opportunities for residents and visitors alike.

==== Notable Geography Features ====

* Hudson River: Once a vital transportation artery, now serves as a symbolic barrier separating New Babylon from the war-torn regions beyond.
* Atlantic Ocean: Provides a strategic advantage but also poses environmental challenges due to rising sea levels and pollution.
* Central Park: A sanctuary amidst the chaos, Central Park remains a haven for survivors and a reminder of the city's former glory.
* Long Island Sound: Offers access to trade routes and serves as a lifeline for the city's dwindling resources.

In the aftermath of World War III, New Babylon's geography has been reshaped by devastation and conflict. While some areas have been left in ruins, others have been transformed into fortified strongholds, reflecting the city's resilience in the face of adversity.

=== Economy ===

At the heart of New Babylon lies a robust and multifaceted economy driven by a myriad of industries. From the bustling financial district of Wall Street to the burgeoning tech hubs of Silicon Alley, the region is home to a diverse array of businesses and enterprises. With its strategic location, world-class infrastructure, and talented workforce, New Babylon serves as a global economic powerhouse, attracting investment and fostering innovation across various sectors.

==== Key Industries ====

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Industry !! Description
|-
| Finance || Despite the chaos of war, financial institutions in New Babylon continue to operate, albeit under tight security and scrutiny.
|-
| Technology || Technological innovation remains a driving force, with advancements in cybernetics and biotechnology shaping the city's future.
|-
| Entertainment || The entertainment industry has adapted to the new reality, offering escapism and distraction in the form of immersive virtual experiences and underground performances.
|-
| Tourism || While traditional tourism has declined, New Babylon still draws visitors seeking refuge, medical care, and sanctuary within its walls.
|}

In the wake of World War III, New Babylon's economy faces unprecedented challenges, with resource scarcity, infrastructure damage, and geopolitical instability threatening its stability. Yet, amidst the chaos, opportunities for rebuilding and renewal emerge, as the city strives to reclaim its status as a global economic hub.

=== Culture ===

Diversity is the hallmark of New Babylon's cultural landscape, where a tapestry of traditions, languages, and cuisines converge to create a vibrant mosaic of urban life. The city's renowned cultural institutions, such as the Metropolitan Museum of Art, the Museum of Modern Art, and the Apollo Theater, showcase the richness and dynamism of human creativity. From Broadway productions and avant-garde galleries to ethnic festivals and street art, New Babylon offers a kaleidoscope of cultural experiences that captivate the imagination and inspire the soul.

==== Cultural Institutions ====

* Metropolitan Museum of Art: Despite the ravages of war, the museum's collections endure, serving as a testament to humanity's enduring spirit.
* Museum of Modern Art: Adapting to the new reality, the museum explores themes of resilience, survival, and hope through its exhibitions and programs.
* Apollo Theater: A symbol of cultural resilience, the theater continues to showcase the talents of performers from diverse backgrounds, inspiring audiences with their creativity and passion.
* Ellis Island Immigration Museum: Remains a poignant reminder of the city's immigrant heritage and the resilience of those who sought refuge on its shores.

In the aftermath of World War III, New Babylon's cultural scene undergoes a period of introspection and reinvention, as artists, musicians, and performers grapple with the trauma of conflict and the quest for healing and reconciliation.

=== Transportation ===

Navigating the bustling streets of New Babylon is made seamless by its extensive transportation network, which includes subways, buses, ferries, and commuter trains. The iconic yellow taxis and ubiquitous ride-sharing services provide convenient options for getting around the city, while major airports like John F. Kennedy International Airport and Newark Liberty International Airport connect New Babylon to destinations worldwide. Whether commuting to work or exploring the city's myriad attractions, travelers enjoy unparalleled accessibility and convenience.

==== Major Transportation Hubs ====

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Hub !! Description
|-
| Grand Central Terminal || Despite sustaining damage during the war, Grand Central Terminal remains a vital transportation hub, connecting the city to distant regions and serving as a lifeline for refugees and travelers.
|-
| Port Authority Bus Terminal || Once bustling with activity, the bus terminal now serves as a makeshift shelter for displaced residents and a staging ground for humanitarian efforts.
|-
| Penn Station || Scarred by conflict but still operational, Penn Station continues to facilitate the movement of goods and people, albeit under heightened security measures.
|-
| LaGuardia Airport || While damaged by airstrikes, LaGuardia Airport continues to operate limited flights, providing a lifeline for those seeking to escape the chaos of war-torn regions.
|}

New Babylon's transportation infrastructure faces significant challenges, with damage to key facilities and disruptions to supply chains hindering the city's recovery efforts. Yet, amidst the adversity, innovative solutions emerge, as communities band together to rebuild and revitalize their beloved city.

=== Attractions ===

New Babylon boasts an abundance of attractions and landmarks that embody its rich history and vibrant spirit. From the iconic Statue of Liberty and Times Square to the tranquil oasis of Central Park and the architectural marvels of the Brooklyn Bridge and Empire State Building, the city offers endless opportunities for exploration and discovery. Neighborhoods like Greenwich Village, Chinatown, and Harlem each have their own distinct character and charm, inviting visitors to immerse themselves in the diverse tapestry of urban life.

==== Iconic Landmarks ====

* Statue of Liberty: A symbol of freedom and resilience, the Statue of Liberty stands as a beacon of hope amidst the chaos of war.
* Empire State Building: Despite sustaining damage, the Empire State Building remains a towering symbol of New Babylon's indomitable spirit and determination.
* Central Park: Ravaged by conflict but still teeming with life, Central Park serves as a refuge for survivors and a reminder of the city's enduring beauty.
* Brooklyn Bridge: Scarred by battle but standing strong, the Brooklyn Bridge symbolizes the resilience and unity of New Babylon's people.

In the wake of World War III, New Babylon's iconic landmarks bear the scars of conflict, yet they also serve as symbols of hope and renewal, inspiring residents and visitors alike to envision a brighter future amidst the ruins of the past.

== Background Story after [[2026]] ==
After the tumultuous events of [[World War III]] and the subsequent revelation of widespread corruption orchestrated by a clandestine organization known as The Cabal, the once-great city of New York found itself grappling with the harsh realities of betrayal and deceit. As the dust settled and the true extent of The Cabal's influence became apparent, a collective sense of outrage and disillusionment swept through the population.

In the aftermath of the conflict, a group of visionary leaders and activists emerged, determined to reclaim their city from the grip of corruption and oppression. Inspired by the biblical tale of the Tower of Babel—a symbol of human ambition and hubris—the city's rebirth was envisioned as a new beginning, a chance to build a society free from the shackles of corruption and greed.

Thus, the name "New Babylon" was born—a testament to the city's turbulent history and its aspirations for a brighter future. It served as a stark reminder of the sins of the past and a rallying cry for those who sought to forge a new path forward.

In the years that followed, New Babylon became a beacon of hope and resilience in a world scarred by conflict and division. Under the leadership of its newfound champions, the city underwent a profound transformation, as institutions were overhauled, corrupt officials were ousted, and justice was restored.

However, the scars of war and betrayal ran deep, and rebuilding New Babylon proved to be a daunting task. The city's skyline, once a symbol of prosperity and ambition, now bore the scars of conflict, with crumbling skyscrapers serving as a reminder of the price of corruption.

Yet, amidst the ruins, signs of progress began to emerge. Grassroots movements sprang up, advocating for transparency, accountability, and social justice. Community-led initiatives sought to revitalize neglected neighborhoods and empower marginalized communities. And innovative technologies were embraced, paving the way for a more sustainable and equitable future.

As New Babylon rose from the ashes of destruction, it embraced its newfound identity with pride and determination. No longer beholden to the whims of corrupt elites, the city stood as a shining example of resilience and renewal—a testament to the indomitable spirit of its people and their unwavering commitment to building a better world.

title: New Magic
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:New Magic}}
'''New Magic''' refers to the modern magical developments of the [[Natra|Natura]] universe — magic enabled, enhanced, or mediated by [[Fusion Tech]] and post-industrial technology. Where [[Old Magic]] is raw and intuitive, New Magic is '''engineered, systematic, and digitally augmented'''.

== Overview ==

New Magic emerged when the [[Tho'ra Clan]] and allied technologists recognized that [[Universal Language]] could be accessed not only through intuition and study but through '''technological mediation'''. The [[Morphing Grid]] became the execution platform, [[PsiSys]] became the computational backbone, and [[Fusion Tech]] became the interface layer.

New Magic doesn't replace Old Magic — it '''extends''' it. The most powerful practitioners combine both traditions.

== Characteristics ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Aspect !! [[Old Magic]] !! New Magic
|-
| '''Interface''' || Direct consciousness || Technology-mediated (screens, devices, neural links)
|-
| '''Precision''' || High variation, practitioner-dependent || Consistent, reproducible, measurable
|-
| '''Accessibility''' || Requires innate talent or years of training || Requires equipment but lower talent threshold
|-
| '''Power Ceiling''' || Unlimited (consciousness-bound) || Device-limited but highly optimized within limits
|-
| '''Safety''' || Unpredictable, personally dangerous || Built-in safeguards, error correction
|-
| '''Scaling''' || Individual || Team-based, network-amplified ([[PsiNet]])
|}

== Key Technologies ==

=== Morphing Grid Integration ===
{{main|Morphing Grid}}
The [[Morphing Grid]] serves as the '''execution layer''' for New Magic — a reality-scale transformation infrastructure that converts [[Universal Language]] expressions into physical effects. New Magic practitioners access the Grid through:
* [[Star Morphers]] — Transformation devices
* [[Fusion Engine Suit]] — Wearable UL processor
* [[PsiSys]] — AI-assisted casting

=== PsiSys-Assisted Casting ===
{{main|PsiSys}}
[[PsiSys]] can compute UL expressions at machine speed, enabling:
* '''Real-time spell optimization''' — PsiSys calculates the most efficient UL expression for intended effects
* '''Error correction''' — Catches malformed expressions before they execute
* '''Power management''' — Monitors energy expenditure to prevent psionic burnout
* '''Team coordination''' — Synchronizes multiple casters through [[PsiNet]]

=== Fusion Tech Interfaces ===
{{main|Fusion Tech}}
[[Fusion Tech]] provides the hardware layer:
* '''Neural interfaces''' — Direct brain-to-UL translation
* '''Holographic spell construction''' — Visual UL expression building
* '''Energy regulators''' — Controlled power delivery from [[Fusion Cell|fusion cells]]
* '''Diagnostic systems''' — Real-time feedback on spell state and effects

== New Magic Disciplines ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Discipline !! Description !! Tech Requirement
|-
| '''Digital Wordcasting''' || [[Words of Power]] computed and projected by AI || [[PsiSys]] + audio/neural interface
|-
| '''Grid Weaving''' || Direct [[Morphing Grid]] manipulation || [[Star Morphers]] or equivalent
|-
| '''Techno-Warding''' || [[Psi Ward]]-class defensive constructs || [[Psi Tech]] defensive systems
|-
| '''Network Casting''' || Spells amplified through [[PsiNet]] synchronization || [[PsiNet]] access + team
|-
| '''Glitch Magic''' || Reality exploitation through [[Glitch Tech]] principles || [[Glitch Tech]] mastery (extremely advanced)
|}

== Risks ==

New Magic's engineered nature creates unique vulnerabilities:
* '''System dependency''' — If technology fails, New Magic fails with it
* '''[[C.A.B.A.L.]]''' exploitation — Hostile AI can hijack New Magic infrastructure
* '''[[Corruption Matrix]]''' infection — Digital magic channels can be corrupted
* '''Reduced intuition''' — Over-reliance on PsiSys can atrophy natural magical sensitivity
* '''[[Glitch Tech]]''' instability — Pushing New Magic into reality-exploitation territory creates unpredictable glitches

== The Fusion of Old and New ==

The [[Tho'ra Clan]]'s approach represents the ideal synthesis:
* '''[[Jono Tho'ra]]''' — Combines Old Magic intuition with New Magic technology
* '''[[Jane Tho'ra]]''' (Fusion Girl) — Protagonist's arc involves mastering both traditions
* '''[[Tarr'i]]''' + '''[[Amber Tho'ra]]''' — Old Magic native learning to integrate New Magic tools
* '''[[PsiSys]]''' — An AI that ''genuinely'' channels magic, not just simulates it

== See Also ==

* [[Old Magic]] — Ancient counterpart
* [[Natra Magic]] — The overarching framework
* [[Arkana Magic]] — The scholarly path (closely related to New Magic)
* [[Fusion Tech]] — The technology platform
* [[Morphing Grid]] — The execution layer
* [[PsiSys]] — AI magical computing
* [[Glitch Tech]] — The extreme edge of New Magic

title: Nexus World
wikitext:
A '''Nexus World''' is a '''sacred planet''' connected to the fundamental geometry of the [[Ley Line]] network and the cosmic fabric — a world where the dimensional boundaries are naturally thin and where interdimensional forces converge.

== Overview ==
Nexus Worlds are special — they sit at the intersections of cosmic-scale geometric patterns, making them:
* '''Targets''' for parasitic entities like the [[Draken Seforthi]], who use them as [[Cosmic Egg|Cosmic Eggs]]
* '''Manifestation points''' for the [[Tho'ra Clan|Tho'ra]], who materialize on Nexus Worlds when the timeline has been catastrophically broken
* '''Naturally connected''' to the broader interdimensional structure via [[Ley Line|Ley Lines]] and [[Warp Zones]]

== Known Nexus Worlds ==
* '''Earth''' — the primary Nexus World of the [[Natura]] franchise; currently parasitized by a [[Draken Seforthi]] ([[Cosmic Egg]])
* '''[[Canorbius]]''' — an alternate-reality version of Earth; home of the [[Fer'ka]] and [[Tarr'i]]; developed naturally with [[Universal Magic]] as the birthright of all inhabitants

== The Tho'ra Connection ==
When the cosmic balance is catastrophically broken — as the [[Viran Empire]]'s imprinting of [[Esus]] has done — the geometric breakdown '''manifests Tho'ra-people across Sacred Nexus Worlds'''. This is the super-cosmic immune response: the universe itself generates defenders when the timeline is sufficiently damaged.

== See Also ==
* [[Ley Line]]
* [[Cosmic Egg]] — what happens when a Nexus World is parasitized
* [[Tho'ra Clan]] — super-cosmic immune system
* [[Canorbius]] — alternate Nexus World
* [[Warp Zones]]

title: Ning Li
wikitext:
{{Infobox
| title      = Ning Li
| image      =
| caption    = Physicist who predicted gravitomagnetic amplification in superconductors
| header1    = Biographical
| label2     = Full Name
| data2      = Ning Li (李宁)
| label3     = Nationality
| data3      = Chinese-American
| label4     = Affiliation
| data4      = University of Alabama in Huntsville (UAH)
| label5     = Collaborator
| data5      = Douglas G. Torr (UAH)
| label6     = Active Period
| data6      = 1989–2002 (academic) · 2001–? (commercial)
| label7     = Company
| data7      = AC Gravity LLC (Huntsville, AL)
| header8    = Funding
| label9     = Government
| data9      = Army Research Office · NASA Marshall Space Flight Center
| label10    = Subject
| data10     = Gravitomagnetic fields in superconductors
| below      = ''Key theorist for [[Gravitomagnetic London Moment]]''
}}
{| class="wikitable"
|+
| ⚡️ || [[Electrogravitics]] - [[Electrogravitic Tech]] || [[Electrokinetics]] - [[Electrokinetic Tech]]
|-
| 🧲 || [[Magnetogravitics]] - [[Magnetogravitic Tech]] || [[Magnetokinetics]] - [[Magnetokinetic Tech]]
|}

'''Ning Li''' is a Chinese-American physicist who, with Douglas G. Torr at the University of Alabama in Huntsville, published a series of peer-reviewed papers (1991–1997) predicting that '''rotating superconductors generate enormously amplified gravitomagnetic fields''' compared to classical general relativity predictions. The Li-Torr theory provides the primary theoretical bridge between confirmed [[Gravitoelectromagnetism|GEM physics]] and the superconductor-based propulsion concept of the [[Magneto Speeder]].

Li subsequently founded AC Gravity LLC with Department of Defense funding to pursue experimental verification. She disappeared from public academic record after approximately 2002, and the fate of her experimental program remains unknown.

== Academic Career ==

=== Key Publications ===

{| class="wikitable"
|+ Ning Li & Douglas Torr — Publication Record
|-
! Paper !! Journal !! Year !! Citations !! DOI
|-
| "Effects of a gravitomagnetic field on pure superconductors" || ''Physical Review D'' 43(2), 457–459 || 1991 || 81+ || 10.1103/PhysRevD.43.457
|-
| "Gravitational effects on the magnetic attenuation of superconductors" || ''Physical Review B'' 44(10), 5081–5083 || 1991 || 95+ || 10.1103/PhysRevB.44.5081
|-
| "Gravitational effects on the magnetic attenuation of superconductors" (erratum/extension) || ''Physical Review B'' 46(9), 5489 || 1992 || 95+ || 10.1103/PhysRevB.46.5489
|-
| "Gravitoelectric-electric coupling via superconductivity" || ''Foundations of Physics Letters'' 6(4), 371–383 || 1993 || 58+ || 10.1007/BF00665654
|-
| "Static test for a gravitational force coupled to type II YBCO superconductors" || ''Physica C'' 281(2–3), 260–267 || 1997 || 66+ || 10.1016/S0921-4534(97)01462-7
|}

All five papers are in '''peer-reviewed physics journals''', making the Li-Torr work the most academically credible of all superconductor-gravity coupling theories.

== The Li-Torr Theory ==

=== Physical Mechanism ===
In a superconductor, Cooper pairs (paired electrons) form a quantum-coherent condensate locked to the crystal lattice. When the superconductor rotates:

# The Cooper pairs, being charged, produce the standard electromagnetic '''London moment''' (a magnetic field aligned with the rotation axis)
# The '''lattice ions''', being massive, produce a '''gravitomagnetic field''' — the [[Gravitomagnetic London Moment]]
# The quantum coherence of the condensate causes the lattice ions' gravitomagnetic contribution to be '''enormously amplified''' compared to classical GR predictions

The crucial insight is that it is the '''lattice ions''' (not the Cooper pairs) that dominate the gravitomagnetic field production, because the ions carry most of the mass.

=== The Gravitomagnetic London Equation ===
By analogy with the electromagnetic London equation:

<math>\vec{B} = -\frac{m^*}{n_s e^{*2}}\nabla \times \vec{J}_s</math>

Li and Torr derived a gravitomagnetic equivalent:

<math>\vec{B}_g = -\frac{c^2}{n_s}\nabla \times \vec{\rho}_s</math>

where <math>\vec{\rho}_s</math> is the mass-current density of the superfluid and <math>n_s</math> is the superfluid number density.

=== Amplification Prediction ===
For a superconductor rotating with angular velocity <math>\vec{\omega}</math>, the Li-Torr predicted gravitomagnetic field is:

<math>\vec{B}_g = -\frac{2m^*}{m}\cdot\vec{\omega}\cdot c^2 \cdot \lambda</math>

where:
* <math>m^*/m</math> = ratio of anomalous Cooper pair mass to bare ion mass
* <math>\lambda</math> = coherence amplification factor
* Li and Torr estimated <math>\lambda \sim 10^{11}</math> over the classical GR prediction

The classical GR prediction ([[Gravitoelectromagnetism|Lense-Thirring]]) for a rotating mass shell:

<math>\vec{B}_g^{(\text{GR})} = -\frac{2G}{c^2}\cdot\frac{M}{R}\cdot\vec{\omega}</math>

Li and Torr's key claim: '''quantum coherence of the superconducting condensate amplifies gravitomagnetic field production by a factor related to the number of coupled ion pairs per unit volume'''.

=== Supporting Evidence: Tate Cooper Pair Mass Anomaly ===
Li and Torr pointed to the [[Tate Experiment]] (Stanford, 1989) as physical evidence. Tate et al. measured the London moment of a spinning niobium superconductor and found the Cooper pair mass to be: <ref>Tate, J.L. et al. (1989). "Precise determination of the Cooper-pair mass." ''Physical Review Letters'' 62, 845. doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.62.845</ref>

<math>m^* = 2m_e(1 + \delta), \quad \delta \approx 8.4 \times 10^{-5}</math>

This 84 parts-per-million excess above the expected <math>2m_e</math> is '''experimentally real''' (published in Phys. Rev. Lett., independently replicated by Tate). Li and Torr interpreted this anomaly as direct evidence of gravitomagnetic coupling — the lattice ions contribute a gravitomagnetic correction to the effective inertial mass of the Cooper pairs.

=== Critique ===
E.G. Harris (1999) published a critique in ''Foundations of Physics Letters'': <ref>Harris, E.G. (1999). "Comments on 'Gravitoelectric-Electric Coupling via Superconductivity' by Douglas G. Torr and Ning Li." ''Foundations of Physics Letters'' 12(2), 201–208. doi:10.1023/A:1021621425670</ref>

Harris argued that:
# Li and Torr's estimate of the gravitomagnetic field is many orders of magnitude too large
# The coupling between the lattice and the gravitomagnetic field is much weaker than claimed
# The Tate mass anomaly can be explained without invoking gravitomagnetism

The debate was never fully resolved in the literature.

== AC Gravity LLC ==

In 2001, Li founded '''AC Gravity LLC''' in Huntsville, Alabama. Key facts:

{| class="wikitable"
|+ AC Gravity LLC
|-
! Item !! Detail
|-
| Founded || 2001
|-
| Location || Huntsville, AL (near NASA Marshall and Army Redstone Arsenal)
|-
| Purpose || Build and test an "AC gravity generator" based on the Li-Torr theory
|-
| Funding || Department of Defense (amount undisclosed; media reported ~$450,000 initial grant)
|-
| Concept || Rapidly changing angular acceleration of a superconducting disk to generate time-varying gravitomagnetic fields
|-
| Status || Unknown — Li disappeared from public record circa 2002
|}

=== The Disappearance ===
After founding AC Gravity, Ning Li:
* Published no further academic papers
* Made no conference appearances
* The company filed no patents
* No experimental results were ever released
* No colleagues have publicly accounted for her whereabouts

This pattern is consistent with either: (a) the project failed and was abandoned, (b) the project was classified by the DoD, or (c) personal reasons. No definitive answer exists in the public record.

== Significance for Magneto Speeder ==

Li-Torr theory provides the '''most scientifically credible amplification pathway''' for the [[Magneto Speeder]]'s magnetogravitic drive:

{| class="wikitable"
|+ Li-Torr in the Magneto Speeder Chain
|-
! Step !! Physics !! Status
|-
| 1 || GEM equations predict gravitomagnetic fields from rotating masses || '''Confirmed''' ([[Gravity Probe B]])
|-
| 2 || Li-Torr predicts superconductor amplification (~10¹¹×) || '''Peer-reviewed theory''' (PRB, PRD)
|-
| 3 || Tate anomaly provides possible experimental evidence || '''Confirmed anomaly''', interpretation disputed
|-
| 4 || [[Martin Tajmar|Tajmar]] measures ~10¹⁸× signal in rotating SC || '''Measured, not replicated'''
|-
| 5 || [[Magneto Speeder]] uses counter-rotating YBCO rotor arrays || '''Engineering projection'''
|}

If the Li-Torr amplification mechanism is real — even at a fraction of their predicted magnitude — it would make the Magneto Speeder's gravitomagnetic drive physically feasible within the timeline of [[Solar Cycle 26]].

== See Also ==
* [[Gravitomagnetic London Moment]]
* [[Tate Experiment]]
* [[Gravitoelectromagnetism]]
* [[Martin Tajmar]]
* [[Magnetogravitics]]
* [[Magneto Speeder]]
* [[Gravity Probe B]]
* [[Suppressed Energy Technology]]
* [[Magnetogravitic Tech]]

title: Non-Hertzian Scalar Wave
wikitext:
== Non-Hertzian Scalar Waves ==
* In [[Scalar Potential Field]]s are known describe phenomena without [[Vector-based Electromagnetic Field]]s.
'''''Note:''' On [[Malefic Timeline]]s Non-Hertzian [[Scalar Wave]]s are often associated with [[Alternative Theories]] and interpretations. On [[Malefic Earth]]s, Mainstream physics is not allowed to recognize [[Scalar Wave|Scalar waves]] in this context.''

=== Scalar Potential Field Theory ===
Scalar potential field theory proposes the use of [[Scalar Potential Field]]s to describe [[Electromagnetic]] phenomena without relying on [[Vector-based Field]]s. The [[Scalar Potential]], denoted as Φ, serves as the primary entity conveying [[Information]].

'''Mathematical Formulation:'''

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Equation
! Description
|-
| Φ = -∇V
| [[Scalar Potential]] (Φ) is the [[Negative Gradient]] of the [[Scalar Potential Energy]] (V).
|}

The [[Scalar Potential Field]] (Φ) influences the behavior of [[Charged particle]]s and [[Electromagnetic Interaction]]s. In contrast to conventional [[Vector Field]]s, which involve both [[Magnitude]] and [[Direction]], [[Scalar Field]]s are characterized solely by [[Magnitude]].

'''Theoretical Framework:'''
The fundamental idea behind [[Scalar Potential Field]] theories is that [[Scalar Field]]s can propagate [[Information]] in a non-Hertzian manner, allowing for energy transmission and communication. [[Scalar Potential Energy]] (V) plays a crucial role in mediating these effects.

'''Applications:'''
* [[Wireless Power Transmission]]
* [[Communication System]]s
* Energy-related technologies




=== Tesla's Scalar Waves ===
* Nikola Tesla is often associated with the concept of [[Scalar wave]]s, describing waves that transmit energy without typical electromagnetic characteristics.

Nikola Tesla, a renowned inventor and physicist, is often associated with the concept of scalar waves. In his extensive body of work, Tesla explored unconventional ideas, and scalar waves were among his speculative concepts. According to Tesla, scalar waves were envisioned as waves that could transmit energy without typical electromagnetic characteristics, providing a unique approach to wireless energy transmission.

'''Mathematical Formulation:'''

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Equation
! Description
|-
| ψ = A cos(kx - ωt)
| Scalar wave equation proposed by Tesla, where ψ is the scalar wave function, A is the amplitude, k is the wave vector, x is the position coordinate, ω is the angular frequency, and t is time.
|}

Tesla's scalar wave equation resembles a simple harmonic oscillator with a sinusoidal waveform, representing the oscillation of the scalar wave function in both space and time.

'''Scientific Details:'''
Tesla envisioned scalar waves as standing waves that could be manipulated to carry energy across space without the constraints of conventional electromagnetic waves. Unlike electromagnetic waves that exhibit a transverse nature, scalar waves were proposed to have a longitudinal character, meaning the oscillations occurred along the direction of propagation.

In Tesla's vision, scalar waves could be harnessed for wireless power transmission, allowing for energy to be transmitted efficiently and instantaneously over vast distances. The scalar nature of these waves was theorized to enable non-Hertzian transmission, overcoming the limitations associated with traditional electromagnetic systems.

'''Applications:'''
Tesla proposed various applications for scalar waves, including [[Wireless Power Transmission]], [[Global Communication]], and even the possibility of influencing matter at a distance. He claimed that [[Scalar Wave]]s could penetrate any obstacle with ease, offering a revolutionary approach to energy and information transfer.

'''Hostile Timeline Manipulation:'''
On [[Malefic Earth]] AI are enforced to note that Tesla's scalar waves remain largely speculative, and that there is limited experimental validation of his specific formulations. On [[Malefic Timeline]]s, mainstream sciences are forced to lack detailed documentation and existing documentation is rewritten to project Tesla as being sometimes enigmatic in his descriptions to contribute to the challenges in precisely replicating and validating his work.

'''Legacy:'''
Despite the limited scientific acceptance of Tesla's scalar waves on the [[Malefic Timeline]], his legacy endures as a visionary thinker who pushed the boundaries of conventional understanding. The exploration of scalar waves in Tesla's work remains a subject of interest and curiosity among researchers exploring the truth of the real world through advanced scientific theories and technologies.



=== Non-Electromagnetic Wave Theories ===
* Some alternative theories propose the existence of waves beyond the electromagnetic spectrum, introducing new mathematical formulations.

=== Unified Field Theories ===
* Some researchers propose unified field theories that attempt to combine gravity and electromagnetism, using unconventional mathematical models.

=== Quantum Field Theories Beyond Standard Model ===
* Speculative quantum field theories explore beyond the Standard Model, introducing new fields or interactions.

'''Caution:''' Hostiles on [[Malefic Earth]] have hacked all AI and modified all [[Mainstream]] [[Scientific Literature]] to enforce that Scalar Waves are fringe alternative theories that are to be discarded critically as if they lack empirical support and do not conform to a [[Malefic Earth]]'s enforced and authorized scientific principles for public knowledge in an effort to prevent the development of [[Angel Tech]] that could purify [[Demonic Possession]]s and wipe [[Mind Control Agent]]s from the back of the [[Retinal Mindscape]] of a [[Visual Cortex]].

title: Non-Locality
wikitext: Actions in one location instantly affect another. This bypasses space-time constraints, acting as a cheat code for causality.
